---
title: ""
author: "Mark Zhang"
date: last-modified
format:
  pdf:
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: blue
    number-sections: true
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
---


```{python}
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf

# -----------------------------
# 1. Load and clean
# -----------------------------
df_shots = pd.read_csv("../data/mxd_shots.csv", dtype={60: str, 64: str}).copy()
df_shots.columns = df_shots.columns.str.lower()

# keep only complete ends
df_shots = df_shots[
    df_shots.groupby(["id", "game", "end"])["shot"].transform("nunique") == 11
].copy()

# ids
df_shots["match_id"] = df_shots["id"].astype(str) + "_" + df_shots["game"].astype(str)
df_shots["match_end_id"] = (
    df_shots["id"].astype(str) + "_"
    + df_shots["game"].astype(str) + "_"
    + df_shots["end"].astype(str)
)

# hammer team
is_t1_hammer = df_shots["t1"].eq(df_shots["hammer_end"])
df_shots["hteam"] = np.where(is_t1_hammer, df_shots["t1"], df_shots["t2"])
df_shots["nhteam"] = np.where(is_t1_hammer, df_shots["t2"], df_shots["t1"])

# hammer / non-hammer scores
for phase in ["before", "during", "after"]:
    df_shots[f"h_{phase}"] = np.where(
        is_t1_hammer, df_shots[f"t1{phase}"], df_shots[f"t2{phase}"]
    )
    df_shots[f"nh_{phase}"] = np.where(
        is_t1_hammer, df_shots[f"t2{phase}"], df_shots[f"t1{phase}"]
    )
```

```{python}
# -----------------------------
# Hammer-team shot-type metric
# -----------------------------
offensive_types = ["Draw", "Raise", "Guard", "Front", "Freeze"]
defensive_types = [
    "Take-out",
    "Double-Take-out",
    "Promotion-Take-out",
    "Hit-and-Roll",
    "Clearing",
    "Wick-Soft-Peeling"
]

# hammer team throws shots 2, 4, 6, 8, 10
hammer_shots = df_shots[df_shots["shot"].isin([2, 4, 6, 8, 10])].copy()

shot_metric_end = (
    hammer_shots.groupby("match_end_id", as_index=False)
    .agg(
        h_offensive_shots=("throw", lambda s: s.isin(offensive_types).sum()),
        h_defensive_shots=("throw", lambda s: s.isin(defensive_types).sum())
    )
)

shot_metric_end["h_classified_shots"] = (
    shot_metric_end["h_offensive_shots"] + shot_metric_end["h_defensive_shots"]
)

shot_metric_end["h_offensive_shot_rate"] = (
    shot_metric_end["h_offensive_shots"] / shot_metric_end["h_classified_shots"]
)
```

```{python}
ends = df_shots.drop_duplicates("match_end_id").copy()

# 2) end-level indicators (same as your definitions)
ends["HE"] = (ends["h_during"] >= 2).astype(int)     # hammer scores 2+
ends["FE"] = (ends["h_during"] <= 1).astype(int)     # non-hammer holds hammer to 0/1
ends["SE"] = (ends["nh_during"] >= 1).astype(int)    # non-hammer scores 1+

# 3) make team-end rows (2 rows per end: one for hammer team, one for non-hammer team)
hammer_rows = pd.DataFrame({
    "team": ends["hteam"],
    "HE": ends["HE"],          # defined when you HAVE hammer
    "FE": np.nan,
    "SE": np.nan,
})

nonhammer_rows = pd.DataFrame({
    "team": ends["nhteam"],
    "HE": np.nan,
    "FE": ends["FE"],          # defined when you DON'T have hammer
    "SE": ends["SE"],
})

team_end = pd.concat([hammer_rows, nonhammer_rows], ignore_index=True)

# 4) team-level rates (averages over eligible ends)
team_rates = team_end.groupby("team", as_index=False).agg(
    HE=("HE","mean"),
    FE=("FE","mean"),
    SE=("SE","mean"),
    n_HE=("HE","count"),
    n_FE=("FE","count"),
    n_SE=("SE","count"),
)

# 5) weighted average team strength
w_HE, w_FE, w_SE = 1/3, 1/3, 1/3
team_rates["strength"] = (
    w_HE * team_rates["HE"] +
    w_FE * team_rates["FE"] +
    w_SE * team_rates["SE"]
)

# 6) merge team-level strength back onto shot-level df_shots (optional)
# (this gives each shot row the strength of its hammer team and non-hammer team)
df_shots = df_shots.merge(team_rates[["team","strength"]], left_on="hteam", right_on="team", how="left") \
                   .rename(columns={"strength":"hteam_strength"}).drop(columns=["team"])

df_shots = df_shots.merge(team_rates[["team","strength"]], left_on="nhteam", right_on="team", how="left") \
                   .rename(columns={"strength":"nhteam_strength"}).drop(columns=["team"])

df_shots["strength_diff"] = df_shots["hteam_strength"] - df_shots["nhteam_strength"]

```

```{python}
# -----------------------------
# 2. End-level dataframe first
# -----------------------------
end_df = df_shots.drop_duplicates("match_end_id").copy()

end_df = end_df[
    [
        "match_id", "match_end_id", "id", "game", "end",
        "hteam", "nhteam",
        "powerplay", "strength_diff",
        "h_before", "nh_before", "h_during", "nh_during", "h_after", "nh_after"
    ]
].copy()

# merge hammer-team shot-type metric onto end-level data
end_df = end_df.merge(
    shot_metric_end[
        [
            "match_end_id",
            "h_offensive_shots",
            "h_defensive_shots",
            "h_classified_shots",
            "h_offensive_shot_rate"
        ]
    ],
    on="match_end_id",
    how="left"
)

# outcome and state variables
end_df["score_diff_before"] = end_df["h_before"] - end_df["nh_before"]
end_df["strength_diff_z"] = (
    end_df["strength_diff"] - end_df["strength_diff"].mean()
) / end_df["strength_diff"].std()
```


```{python}
# multinomial outcome
end_df["outcome"] = np.select(
    [
        end_df["h_during"] >= 2,
        end_df["h_during"] == 1,
        ((end_df["h_during"] == 0) & (end_df["nh_during"] == 0)) | (end_df["nh_during"] >= 1)
    ],
    ["2+", "1", "0"],
    default=None
)

end_df["outcome"] = pd.Categorical(
    end_df["outcome"],
    categories=["0", "1", "2+"]
)

end_df["score_diff_grp"] = np.select(
    [
        end_df["score_diff_before"] < 0,
        end_df["score_diff_before"] == 0,
        end_df["score_diff_before"] > 0
    ],
    [
        "trailing",
        "tied",
        "leading"
    ]
)

end_df["score_diff_grp"] = pd.Categorical(
    end_df["score_diff_grp"],
    categories=["tied", "trailing", "leading"],  # tied as reference
    ordered=False
)

```


```{python}

end_int = end_df["end"].astype(int)
end_df["end_grp"] = np.select(
    [end_int <= 6, end_int >= 7],
    ["<=6", ">=7"],
    default=None
)

end_df["end_grp"] = pd.Categorical(
    end_df["end_grp"],
    categories=["<=6",">=7"]
)
```


```{python}
import statsmodels.api as sm
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf

style_df = end_df.dropna(
    subset=[
        "h_offensive_shots",
        "h_classified_shots",
        "powerplay",
        "score_diff_grp",
        "end_grp",
        "strength_diff_z",
        "match_id"
    ]
).copy()

style_df["h_defensive_shots"] = (
    style_df["h_classified_shots"] - style_df["h_offensive_shots"]
)

style_glm = smf.glm(
    """
    h_offensive_shots + h_defensive_shots ~ powerplay
                                           + C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                                           + C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                                           + powerplay:C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                                           
                                           + strength_diff_z
    """,
    data=style_df,
    family=sm.families.Binomial()
).fit(
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": style_df["match_id"]}
)

print(style_glm.summary())
```
```{python}
model_df = end_df.dropna(
    subset=["powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp", "match_id"]
).copy()

sel_result_int = smf.logit(
    """
    powerplay ~ C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
              * C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
    """,
    data=model_df
).fit(
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": model_df["match_id"]},
    maxiter=200
)

print(sel_result_int.summary())
```



```{python}
# =========================================
# MAIN OUTCOME MODEL: multinomial 0 / 1 / 2+
# =========================================
import statsmodels.api as sm
import statsmodels.formula.api as smf
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

# keep complete cases for multinomial model
multi_df = end_df.dropna(
    subset=[
        "outcome",
        "powerplay",
        "score_diff_grp",
        "end_grp",
        "strength_diff_z",
        "match_id"
    ]
).copy()

# make sure baseline category is "0"
multi_df["outcome"] = pd.Categorical(
    multi_df["outcome"],
    categories=["0", "1", "2+"],
    ordered=False
)

# statsmodels MNLogit wants numeric codes
multi_df["outcome_code"] = multi_df["outcome"].cat.codes
# mapping:
# 0 -> "0"
# 1 -> "1"
# 2 -> "2+"

print(multi_df["outcome"].value_counts().sort_index())
print(pd.crosstab(
    [multi_df["powerplay"], multi_df["end_grp"], multi_df["score_diff_grp"]],
    multi_df["outcome"]
))

mnlogit_result = smf.mnlogit(
    """
    outcome_code ~ powerplay
                 + C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                 + C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                 + powerplay:C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
                 + powerplay:C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
                 + strength_diff_z
    """,
    data=multi_df
).fit(
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": multi_df["match_id"]},
    maxiter=200
)

print(mnlogit_result.summary())

```

```{python}
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import patsy
from statsmodels.miscmodels.ordinal_model import OrderedModel

# keep complete cases for ordinal model
ord_df = end_df.dropna(
    subset=[
        "outcome",
        "powerplay",
        "score_diff_grp",
        "end_grp",
        "strength_diff_z",
        "match_id"
    ]
).copy()

# ordered outcome: 0 < 1 < 2+
ord_df["outcome"] = pd.Categorical(
    ord_df["outcome"],
    categories=["0", "1", "2+"],
    ordered=True
)

# numeric codes for OrderedModel
ord_df["outcome_code"] = ord_df["outcome"].cat.codes
# 0 -> "0"
# 1 -> "1"
# 2 -> "2+"

print(ord_df["outcome"].value_counts().sort_index())
print(pd.crosstab(
    [ord_df["powerplay"], ord_df["end_grp"], ord_df["score_diff_grp"]],
    ord_df["outcome"]
))

# same RHS as before, but build exog manually
ord_formula = """
powerplay
+ C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
+ C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
+ powerplay:C(score_diff_grp, Treatment(reference='tied'))
+ powerplay:C(end_grp, Treatment(reference='<=6'))
+ strength_diff_z
"""

X_ord = patsy.dmatrix(ord_formula, data=ord_df, return_type="dataframe")

# OrderedModel should not have an explicit intercept column
if "Intercept" in X_ord.columns:
    X_ord = X_ord.drop(columns="Intercept")

ord_model = OrderedModel(
    endog=ord_df["outcome_code"],
    exog=X_ord,
    distr="logit"
)

ord_result = ord_model.fit(
    method="bfgs",
    maxiter=200,
    disp=False,
    cov_type="cluster",
    cov_kwds={"groups": ord_df["match_id"]}
)

print(ord_result.summary())
```




```{python}
# =========================================
# Predicted probabilities from main MNLogit
# =========================================

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# grid of game states
pred_grid = pd.DataFrame(
    [(pp, sd, eg) for eg in ["<=6", ">=7"]
                  for sd in ["leading", "tied", "trailing"]
                  for pp in [0, 1]],
    columns=["powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp"]
)

# hold strength at average
pred_grid["strength_diff_z"] = 0

# predict probabilities
pred_probs = mnlogit_result.predict(pred_grid).copy()
pred_probs.columns = ["Pr(0)", "Pr(1)", "Pr(2+)"]

# combine
pred_table = pd.concat([pred_grid, pred_probs], axis=1)

# convert to percentages
for col in ["Pr(0)", "Pr(1)", "Pr(2+)"]:
    pred_table[col] = 100 * pred_table[col]

# sort nicely
pred_table["score_diff_grp"] = pd.Categorical(
    pred_table["score_diff_grp"],
    categories=["leading", "tied", "trailing"],
    ordered=True
)
pred_table["end_grp"] = pd.Categorical(
    pred_table["end_grp"],
    categories=["<=6", ">=7"],
    ordered=True
)

pred_table = pred_table.sort_values(
    ["end_grp", "score_diff_grp", "powerplay"]
).reset_index(drop=True)

# rounded version for display
pred_table_round = pred_table.copy()
pred_table_round[["Pr(0)", "Pr(1)", "Pr(2+)"]] = (
    pred_table_round[["Pr(0)", "Pr(1)", "Pr(2+)"]].round(1)
)

print(pred_table_round)
```

```{python}
# Compare power play vs no power play within each game state
pp0 = pred_table_round[pred_table_round["powerplay"] == 0].copy()
pp1 = pred_table_round[pred_table_round["powerplay"] == 1].copy()

pp_compare_round = (
    pp0.merge(
        pp1,
        on=["end_grp", "score_diff_grp"],
        suffixes=("_pp0", "_pp1")
    )
)

# power play - no power play (percentage-point differences)
pp_compare_round["diff_Pr(0)"] = (
    pp_compare_round["Pr(0)_pp1"] - pp_compare_round["Pr(0)_pp0"]
)
pp_compare_round["diff_Pr(1)"] = (
    pp_compare_round["Pr(1)_pp1"] - pp_compare_round["Pr(1)_pp0"]
)
pp_compare_round["diff_Pr(2+)"] = (
    pp_compare_round["Pr(2+)_pp1"] - pp_compare_round["Pr(2+)_pp0"]
)

# keep only the columns you want in the paper
table_out = pp_compare_round[
    ["end_grp", "score_diff_grp", "diff_Pr(0)", "diff_Pr(1)", "diff_Pr(2+)"]
].copy()

# rename for readability
table_out = table_out.rename(columns={
    "end_grp": "End group",
    "score_diff_grp": "Score state",
    "diff_Pr(0)": "ΔPr(0), pp",
    "diff_Pr(1)": "ΔPr(1), pp",
    "diff_Pr(2+)": "ΔPr(2+), pp"
})

# optional: round nicely
table_out[["ΔPr(0), pp", "ΔPr(1), pp", "ΔPr(2+), pp"]] = (
    table_out[["ΔPr(0), pp", "ΔPr(1), pp", "ΔPr(2+), pp"]].round(1)
)

print(table_out.to_string(index=False))
```

## Figures and Tables
```{python}
# MAIN MANUSCRIPT TABLES ONLY
# Prints LaTeX for:
#   Table 1  Descriptive summary
#   Table 2  Power-play effect on predicted probabilities
#
# Assumes you already have:
#   end_df, table_out

import pandas as pd

# -----------------------------
# Labels / ordering
# -----------------------------
score_order = ["leading", "tied", "trailing"]
end_order = ["<=6", ">=7"]

score_labels = {
    "leading": "Hammer team leading",
    "tied": "Tied",
    "trailing": "Hammer team trailing"
}

end_labels = {
    "<=6": "Ends 1--6",
    ">=7": "Ends 7+"
}

# -----------------------------
# TABLE 1
# Descriptive summary
# -----------------------------
table1 = (
    end_df.dropna(
        subset=["outcome", "powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp", "h_offensive_shot_rate"]
    )
    .groupby(["end_grp", "score_diff_grp", "powerplay"], observed=False)
    .agg(
        Ends=("match_end_id", "count"),
        **{
            "0 points (\\%)": ("outcome", lambda s: 100 * (s == "0").mean()),
            "1 point (\\%)": ("outcome", lambda s: 100 * (s == "1").mean()),
            "2+ points (\\%)": ("outcome", lambda s: 100 * (s == "2+").mean()),
            "Hammer offensive shot rate (\\%)": ("h_offensive_shot_rate", lambda s: 100 * s.mean())
        }
    )
    .reset_index()
)

table1["end_grp"] = pd.Categorical(table1["end_grp"], categories=end_order, ordered=True)
table1["score_diff_grp"] = pd.Categorical(table1["score_diff_grp"], categories=score_order, ordered=True)
table1 = table1.sort_values(["end_grp", "score_diff_grp", "powerplay"]).reset_index(drop=True)

table1["End group"] = table1["end_grp"].map(end_labels)
table1["Score state"] = table1["score_diff_grp"].map(score_labels)
table1["Power play"] = table1["powerplay"].map({0: "No", 1: "Yes"})

table1 = table1[
    [
        "End group", "Score state", "Power play", "Ends",
        "0 points (\\%)", "1 point (\\%)", "2+ points (\\%)",
        "Hammer offensive shot rate (\\%)"
    ]
].copy()

num_cols = [
    "0 points (\\%)",
    "1 point (\\%)",
    "2+ points (\\%)",
    "Hammer offensive shot rate (\\%)"
]
table1[num_cols] = table1[num_cols].round(1)

print(r"""
\begin{table}[htbp]
\centering
\caption{Descriptive summary of hammer-end outcomes and hammer-team offensive shot rates by score state, end timing, and power-play use.}
\label{tab:descriptive}
\small
""" + table1.to_latex(
    index=False,
    escape=False,
    column_format="lllrrrrr",
    float_format="%.1f"
) + r"""
\end{table}
""")

# -----------------------------
# TABLE 2
# Power-play effect (percentage points)
# -----------------------------
table2 = table_out.copy().rename(columns={
    "End group": "end_grp",
    "Score state": "score_diff_grp"
})

table2["end_grp"] = pd.Categorical(table2["end_grp"], categories=end_order, ordered=True)
table2["score_diff_grp"] = pd.Categorical(table2["score_diff_grp"], categories=score_order, ordered=True)
table2 = table2.sort_values(["end_grp", "score_diff_grp"]).reset_index(drop=True)

table2["End group"] = table2["end_grp"].map(end_labels)
table2["Score state"] = table2["score_diff_grp"].map(score_labels)

table2 = table2[
    ["End group", "Score state", "ΔPr(0), pp", "ΔPr(1), pp", "ΔPr(2+), pp"]
].copy()

table2[["ΔPr(0), pp", "ΔPr(1), pp", "ΔPr(2+), pp"]] = (
    table2[["ΔPr(0), pp", "ΔPr(1), pp", "ΔPr(2+), pp"]].round(1)
)

print(r"""
\begin{table}[htbp]
\centering
\caption{Estimated effect of power-play use on hammer-team scoring outcomes. Entries report percentage-point changes in predicted probabilities from the multinomial logit model.}
\label{tab:powerplay_effect}
\small
""" + table2.to_latex(
    index=False,
    escape=False,
    column_format="llrrr",
    float_format="%.1f"
) + r"""
\end{table}
""")
```


```{python}

for col in ["h_before", "h_after", "powerplay"]:
    end_df[col] = pd.to_numeric(end_df[col], errors="coerce")

end_df["h_points_scored"] = end_df["h_after"] - end_df["h_before"]

risk_obs = (
    end_df.dropna(subset=["powerplay", "score_diff_grp", "end_grp", "h_points_scored"])
    .groupby(["powerplay", "end_grp", "score_diff_grp"], as_index=False, observed=False)
    .agg(
        n=("h_points_scored", "size"),
        mean_points=("h_points_scored", "mean"),
        sd_points=("h_points_scored", "std"),
        p0=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s == 0).mean()),
        p1=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s == 1).mean()),
        p2plus=("h_points_scored", lambda s: (s >= 2).mean())
    )
)

print(risk_obs.round(3))
```

```{python}
# =========================================
# Power Play minus no Power Play
# =========================================

risk0 = risk_obs[risk_obs["powerplay"] == 0].copy()
risk1 = risk_obs[risk_obs["powerplay"] == 1].copy()

risk_compare = risk0.merge(
    risk1,
    on=["end_grp", "score_diff_grp"],
    suffixes=("_pp0", "_pp1")
)

risk_compare["Delta_mean_points"] = risk_compare["mean_points_pp1"] - risk_compare["mean_points_pp0"]
risk_compare["Delta_sd_points"]   = risk_compare["sd_points_pp1"]   - risk_compare["sd_points_pp0"]
risk_compare["Delta_p0"]          = risk_compare["p0_pp1"]          - risk_compare["p0_pp0"]
risk_compare["Delta_p1"]          = risk_compare["p1_pp1"]          - risk_compare["p1_pp0"]
risk_compare["Delta_p2plus"]      = risk_compare["p2plus_pp1"]      - risk_compare["p2plus_pp0"]

risk_compare_out = risk_compare[
    [
        "end_grp", "score_diff_grp",
        "Delta_mean_points", "Delta_sd_points",
        "Delta_p0", "Delta_p1", "Delta_p2plus"
    ]
].copy()

print(risk_compare_out.round(3).to_string(index=False))
```
